Dialog.name: AST_DNG_DORMITORY_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}I wonder if Kirijo-senpai and the others are okay...[n]{f 1 2 80}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_DORMITORY_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}I-It won't come in through the window, right...?[n]{f 1 2 80}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_DORMITORY_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1056 0 0}Sorry, I know this is sudden and you were sleeping... I promise I'll explain later.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_DORMITORY_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1064 0 0}Wait, are you trying to escape from the window...? You can't do that![n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_TUTORIAL_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}I wonder how far we can get without losing contact with Kirijo-senpai...[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_TUTORIAL_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2004 0 0}Yo, is this really the school...? Like, no joke?[n]{f 1 2 80}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_TUTORIAL_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But it'd be kinda funny if we were actually inside our classroom right now, huh?[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_TUTORIAL_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2101 0 0}Whoa! These open on their own? Sheesh, that scared the crap outta me![n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_TUTORIAL_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 10117 0 0}I'll support you as much as I can, but it's up to you to learn something out there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_TUTORIAL_08
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can still sense some enemies around. Let's move on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MONORAIL_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20617 0 0}Hey, that's Tartarus, right? I guess it looks kinda nice from the distance, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MONORAIL_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20618 0 0}Holy hell, we're real high up! I think I'm gonna hurl...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MONORAIL_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20621 0 0}What's up with Junpei? Did something happen...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MONORAIL_06
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20622 0 0}Hurry! We don't have much time left![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MONORAIL_07
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20623 0 0}I-If we don't stop this thing, the passengers— No, all of us are gonna be dead![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MONORAIL_11
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}Hey, don't get too excited and do something stupid.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MONORAIL_12
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}Is it that stopped one right there? Looks pretty normal to me so far...[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MONORAIL_14
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't care how big it is, it's goin' down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_NIGHT_SCHOOL_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20626 0 0}The school looks so creepy at night... C'mon, let's head to the faculty office.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_NIGHT_SCHOOL_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20627 0 0}Let's go meet the others at the entrance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_FUKA_RESCUE_08
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10124 0 0}Where am I? Why am I here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_THEURGIA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}It's been a while since I've felt this kind of tension...[n]{f 1 2 80}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_THEURGIA_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}Think you can keep up after all this time?[n]{f 1 2 80}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_THEURGIA_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4122 0 0}Believe me, I have no intention of falling behind.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_THEURGIA_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20564 0 0}Do you see any Shadows? They should be just ahead![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_THEURGIA_06
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20565 0 0}We see them. Let's take these guys down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_THEURGIA_08
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20560 0 0}You're approaching a Shadow! Get ready for battle![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_THEURGIA_09
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10035 0 0}Let's head to the stairs that lead up, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_THEURGIA_11
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4115 0 0}We're halfway there. Let's stay alert and finish them off.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_THEURGIA_12
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5143 0 0}Only one Shadow left! You can do it![n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20628 0 0}Let's hurry up and end this thing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20629 0 0}Tonight, it's gonna be all me, baby![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20631 0 0}Let's take it down before it harms any guests.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_08
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20635 0 0}I suppose that's the end of this operation...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_14
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20641 0 0}There was something weird about that mirror...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_15
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20642 0 0}I dunno what's going on, but we just have to smash the mirrors, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_16
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20643 0 0}We just need to break the mirrors, right? Let's hurry and beat this thing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_17
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20644 0 0}So all we need to do is break the mirrors, correct?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_18
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20645 0 0}Something felt off when I stood in front of that mirror...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_19
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20646 0 0}Something off with the mirrors...? Dude, I honestly have no clue.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_21
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20648 0 0}Perhaps it'll be easier to find the difference by taking a closer look...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_22
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20649 0 0}We need to break any mirrors that don't show our reflections.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_23
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20650 0 0}Uh, so which mirror do we break?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_24
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20651 0 0}If a mirror doesn't show our reflection, break it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_25
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20652 0 0}Remember: break any mirror that doesn't show our reflection.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_27
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20654 0 0}This time, I got this in the bag![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_28
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20655 0 0}Ah, finally! Time for the main event![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_29
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20656 0 0}It's time for this operation to come to an end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_30
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1072 0 0}Hey, I saw a big door back there. Maybe we should check it out.[n]{f 1 2 80}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_34
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}There was something weird about the mirror in the room that Shadow was in...[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_HOTEL_38
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1008 0 0}Okay, Leader, you decide which mirrors we should break.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MILITARY_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20657 0 0}Those two just now— No, worry about that later. The Shadow comes first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MILITARY_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20658 0 0}Damn, this place reeks. Like sewer cheese...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MILITARY_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20659 0 0}Didn't think there'd be other Persona-users aside from us...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MILITARY_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20660 0 0}Those Persona-users just now... Better exercise caution around them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MILITARY_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20661 0 0}Lucia couldn't sense them at all... Sorry, I'll concentrate on the Shadow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MILITARY_06
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20662 0 0}It seems this facility was in use during wartime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MILITARY_07
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20663 0 0}Let's just take down this Shadow and get outta here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MILITARY_08
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20664 0 0}Huh? Why the hell are there tread marks?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MILITARY_09
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20665 0 0}These tracks on the ground seem to be made recently...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MILITARY_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20666 0 0}No time to waste. Let's end this before the Dark Hour is over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MILITARY_12
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10069 0 0}I sense the target two blocks ahead of you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10070 0 0}It seems to be moving slowly downward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MILITARY_13
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10073 0 0}It seems it was some kind of armory during the war.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MILITARY_14
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10078 0 0}The target's gaining speed! It's continuing down the tunnel![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_MILITARY_15
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10081 0 0}It turned around! It's waiting for us one block down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_RESERVE_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2091 0 0}The hell was that? He think that makes him cool or somethin', goin' out like that? Dammit...[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_RESERVE_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}I don't know what to think about it either... But we don't have time for that. Let's keep moving.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GET_ITEM_SANADA_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3001 0 0}Hey, something fell out. You should keep it.[n]{f 1 2 80}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GET_ITEM_MITSU_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4070 0 0}It looks like something fell out. We should take it with us.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GET_ITEM_FUKA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}Oh, something came out. Maybe you can use it.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GET_ITEM_AMADA_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7072 0 0}Oh, something came out of that. I'll pick it up.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GET_ITEM_MITSU_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Something fell out of the object you broke. You should take it, just in case.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GET_ITEM_FUKA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5066 0 0}It looks like Koro-chan picked something up for you.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_TBOX_STEAL_MITU_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4092 0 0}It seems to be the type of Shadow that steals from the treasure chests. It's quite quick...[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_TBOX_STEAL_MITU_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4092 0 0}This treasure chest has already been looted. If only we could get ahead of that Shadow...[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_TBOX_STEAL_MITU_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4092 0 0}It's going after treasure chests. See if you can predict its next move.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_TBOX_STEAL_FUKA_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5110 0 0}That Shadow got the treasure chest! Try to see if you can cut it off before it gets to another one.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_TBOX_STEAL_FUKA_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5110 0 0}It took the treasure from this chest too! Let's try another one...[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_TBOX_STEAL_FUKA_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5101 0 0}The Shadow is going after all the treasure chests! Let's ambush it at the next one![n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_ACCIDENT_RBOX_MITU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5218 0 0}It looks like there's a rare treasure chest on this floor. See if you can find it.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_ACCIDENT_RBOX_MITU_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4114 0 0}I sense a rare treasure chest on this floor as well. How fortunate.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_ACCIDENT_MBOX_MITU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5220 0 0}There's a locked chest on this floor. If you can, try to retrieve its contents.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_ACCIDENT_RENEMY_MITU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4086 0 0}I sense a rare Shadow. Try to find and defeat it.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_ACCIDENT_ALLBAD_MITU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4098 0 0}Hm... The Shadows on this floor are behaving strangely...[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_ACCIDENT_ALL_R_MITU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4086 0 0}There are multiple rare Shadows on this floor. This is quite an opportunity.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_ACCIDENT_ALL_S_MITU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 5256 0 0}This floor is full of strong Shadows... Stay on your guard.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_ACCIDENT_DARK_MITU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 5216 0 0}I can't tell what's going on there from here, so be more careful than usual.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_ACCIDENT_MDOOR_MITU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}I'm sensing a distortion... It must be that door. It's dangerous, but may be worth exploring.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_ACCIDENT_RBOX_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 5302 0 0}I'm sensing a valuable treasure chest on this floor. Please try looking for it.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_ACCIDENT_RBOX_FUKA_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5086 0 0}Oh, there's a rare treasure chest on this floor too! That's lucky.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_ACCIDENT_MBOX_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5302 0 0}I'm sensing a locked treasure chest on this floor! We should probably try to find it.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_ACCIDENT_RENEMY_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5087 0 0}I'm sensing a rare Shadow. Do you think you can find it?[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_ACCIDENT_ALLBAD_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5092 0 0}The enemies on this floor are acting strangely. Please be careful.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_ACCIDENT_ALL_R_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5087 0 0}There are a bunch of rare Shadows on this floor! Let's not let this chance go to waste![n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_ACCIDENT_ALL_S_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 5343 0 0}I'm sensing strong enemies throughout this entire floor! Please be extra careful![n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_ACCIDENT_DARK_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5103 0 0}I can't see what's going on around you right now... Please be careful.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_ACCIDENT_MDOOR_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}Oh, I'm getting a reading of that door! Please make sure you're ready if you plan to go in.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_03_007_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5095 0 0}Hey, it looks like we can head down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_007_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5168 0 0}Looks like we can go down that way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_007_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5169 0 0}This might be a way forward. What's the plan?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_007_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5237 0 0}There. We can head down that way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_007_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5238 0 0}It looks like we can proceed from here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_007_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5443 0 0}It looks like this is our way up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_007_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5557 0 0}It looks like we can go down here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_007_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5330 0 0}Koro-chan has found a place that leads down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_007_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5331 0 0}You can head down from there. Thanks, Koro-chan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_11_007_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5746 0 0}Koromaru-san has found a point to descend. He is asking if we'll go down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_11_007_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5747 0 0}Here's a way down... Koromaru-san wants to know our next move.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_007_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5677 0 0}Found some stairs. Time to move on up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_007_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5677 0 0}...That'll take us to the next floor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_11_007_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5743 0 0}Oh, we can go down from here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DEFEAT_GK_MITU_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20109 0 0}The enemy has been defeated. Well done.[n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DEFEAT_GK_MITU_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 1 0 0 0}The path forward is open now. Keep up the good work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DEFEAT_GK_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 20126 0 0}The enemy has been defeated! Great job, everyone![n]{f 1 2 120}

Dialog.name: AST_DEFEAT_GK_FUKA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 0 0 0}Now we can keep going. Good luck, and be careful![n]{f 1 1}
